narrative_beat: Medium overhead 45 of P&B wall calendar with 1948 struck through in rich crimson, golden card beside reading 1984, embers floating

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a 1940s wall calendar page with the year 1948 printed bold at top, struck through by a rich crimson diagonal pen line
subject.focal_point: beside the calendar, a golden printed card with 1984 in elegant serif numerals
subject.secondary: Desk surface in P&B. Floating embers.

composition.foreground: 1948 strike and 1984 card in rich crimson and gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: 1948 in printed calendar serif with crimson strike; 1984 in elegant engraved serif gold
in_scene_text.medium: calendar print for 1948 with pen strike; printed card for 1984
in_scene_text.placement: left: calendar 1948 with red strike; right: gold card 1984
